data.description: This section discusses various aspects of making a saving throw.
A humanoid creature must be designated as the donor of one of its organs to create a clone. The organ is then reanimated into a new form, becoming a clone.

Time: hour
Range:
Touch
Components: M(a worth least 5,000 gp at I inch flesh the and least cubic of of creature that be and which spell is to cloned, the consumes, a vessel at 2,000 that a lid worth least gp has sealable and large such creature, is enough hold Medium as huge coffin, the a urn, mud-filled cyst in ground, crystal container with water)
Duration:

on throws
when succeeds on a saving throw made within range.
effects. Additionally, when a creature enters the spell's area for the first time on its turn starts taking slashing damage equal to 4d4 + the spell's level (or 3d4 at 2nd or 3rd level).
At Higher Leveis. When cast using a spell slot of level 2nd or higher, damage increases to 2d4.
